_comment: Auto-generated to match the actual audio files in this folder. First entry is the opening theme. The in-game player URL-encodes these names, so spaces/accents are fine.

tracks.file: Judith Reyes - Tragedia de la Plaza de las Tres Culturas (Tragedy of Plaza of the Three Cultures).mp3
tracks.title: Tlatelolco: Tragedia de la Plaza de las Tres Culturas — Judith Reyes
tracks.note: OPENING THEME. The corrido of October 2 — the movement's own documentarian names the dead.

tracks.file: Amparo Ochoa - La Maldición de La Malinche (feat. Los Folkloristas).mp3
tracks.title: La Maldicion de Malinche — Amparo Ochoa
tracks.note: The betrayed, unfinished nation — the Rivera prologue.

tracks.title: Me gustan los estudiantes — Violeta Parra
A desalambrar — Daniel Viglietti
tracks.note: Tear down the fences — the toma de tierras.

tracks.title: El Barzon — Amparo Ochoa
tracks.note: The countryside; the peasant's debt and dignity.

tracks.file: Mercedes Sosa - Cuando Tenga La Tierra (Audio).mp3
tracks.title: Cuando tenga la tierra — Mercedes Sosa

tracks.file: Víctor Jara - Te Recuerdo Amanda (En Vivo Peña de los Parra).mp3
tracks.title: Te recuerdo Amanda — Victor Jara
tracks.note: The worker and the factory gate.

tracks.title: Manifiesto — Victor Jara
tracks.note: Why one sings; resonates with the 1976 intervention ending.

tracks.file: Mercedes Sosa - Solo le Pido a Dios.mp3
tracks.title: Solo le pido a Dios — Mercedes Sosa

tracks.file: Mercedes Sosa - Gracias A La Vida.mp3
tracks.title: Gracias a la vida — Mercedes Sosa
tracks.note: Elegiac; the finale and the Rivera coda.

tracks.title: Corrido de Lucio Cabanas
tracks.note: The armed road, the sierra of Guerrero.

tracks.file: Silvio Rodríguez - La Era Está Pariendo un Corazón.mp3
tracks.title: La era esta pariendo un corazon — Silvio Rodriguez
tracks.note: The long accumulation; a new era born painfully.

tracks.file: Pablo Milanés - Yo Pisaré las Calles Nuevamente (En Vivo).mp3
tracks.title: Yo pisare las calles nuevamente — Pablo Milanes
tracks.note: Return and vindication after the dictatorship.

tracks.title: ¡Se acabo! — cancion zapatista
tracks.note: The rural insurgent register; the campesino in arms.

tracks.file: Kaiserreich - Anthem of The United South American States.mp3
tracks.title: Himno — United South American States (Kaiserreich)

tracks.file: LA ERA ESTÁ PARIENDO UN CORAZÓN - Silvio Rodríguez.mp3
tracks.title: LA ERA ESTÁ PARIENDO UN CORAZÓN - Silvio Rodríguez
